description_long: This is an electric bass guitar with a striking magenta body and a classic double-cutaway design, reminiscent of Fender Jazz or Precision basses. The body features a glossy finish with visible wood grain, black control knobs, and two pickups set into the front. The neck is long and slender, finished in a light color, and is fitted with metallic frets and dot inlays. The headstock is compact, matching the neck's color, and is equipped with four tuning pegs arranged in a line. The back of the guitar is smooth and unadorned except for the visible screws and control cavity cover, while the sides reveal the instrument's slim profile.
description: A magenta electric bass guitar with a glossy finish, black hardware, and a long light-colored neck with four inline tuning pegs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the magenta body, black pickups, control knobs, and the full length of the neck and headstock.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the guitar's slim profile and the protruding tuning pegs at the headstock.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth magenta back, control cavity cover, and the light-colored neck and headstock.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the thinness of the body and neck, with minimal hardware visible.
attribute_headstock_design: Compact, inline 4 tuning pegs, no visible logo, rounded contour
